DESCRIPTION: Real-Time Financial Transactions: Best practices: Snowpipe Streaming with MAX_CLIENT_LAG=1s for sub-second latency, External Functions with External Access Integration for fraud API, Dynamic Tables for aggregations, Dynamic Masking for PAN/SSN, Row Access Policy for customer-level RLS, Time Travel (90-day) for audit compliance, ACCESS_HISTORY for audit trails.
